text.title: 60-90 Day Onboarding Phases Procedure
text.summary: End-to-end 5-step procedure to apply 60-90 Day Onboarding Phases. Each step pairs typed input + bounded action + named output + decision-gate. Steps are sequential unless explicitly marked parallel.

step.name: define-contribute-scope
step.action: Pick one project the hire will own end-to-end during days 31-60.
step.output: Scoped project brief with owner, deliverable, exit criteria
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: set-day-60-criteria
step.action: Translate the five success criteria (project completed, positive feedback, minimal supervision, role-level competencies, day-61-90 goals) into observable artifacts for this hire.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: schedule-skip-level
step.action: Schedule a day-45 skip-level with a leader two levels above the hire.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: run-day-60-gate
step.input: Project artefact, skip-level notes, peer feedback
step.action: Score each of the five day-60 criteria; either pass to Execute or write a remediation plan.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

step.name: run-day-90-review
step.input: Major project artefact, autonomy signals, dev plan
step.action: Score day-90 criteria; close ramp or extend with named conditions.
step.decision-gate: Output present and matches `content/02-output-contract.xml` schema for this stage; otherwise block.

section.title: Failure handling
section.p: If a decision-gate blocks, do NOT proceed to the next step. Surface the blockage to the owner with the specific input that did not satisfy the gate. Resume only after the input is corrected.
